data.metadata: {"description":"Super friendly goated founder. Love what he is doing in space and how. Only respect from me! Reviewed already, vouch now! \nWork with him been super smooth! More to come!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Super friendly goated founder. Love what he is doing in space and how. Only respect from me! Reviewed already, vouch now! 
Work with him been super smooth! More to come!

data.metadata: {"description":"Absolutely legendary artist and not only in Pudgy Community! I've already reviewed to him, it's time to vouch you brother Froggy! No doubts that one day we are going to make collab art"}

translation.translatedDescription: Absolutely legendary artist and not only in Pudgy Community! I've already reviewed to him, it's time to vouch you brother Froggy! No doubts that one day we are going to make collab art

data.metadata:
{"description":"Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Sigan a mi parcerita, es una chimba 🔥"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Follow my friend, she's awesome 🔥

data.metadata: {"description":"For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example."}

translation.translatedDescription: For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example.

Pavil is a fellow Giga Chad on Abstract ecosystem whose art is what caught everyone's eye. 

He creates the most epic street art with web3 culture embedded in them. 

Seems like a good and helpful person in general as well. Top giga chad material for sure.

data.comment: Real Giga Chad and community builder on Abstract
data.metadata: {"description":"I met Guezit0 in Abstract community. He is very active interms of ecosystem engagement and content creation. His value is above and beyond. His inclusion in the community creates great postive impact to the Abstract as a whole. I believe that he can move up to another level with this great pace !"}

translation.translatedContent: Real Giga Chad and community builder on Abstract
translation.translatedDescription: I met Guezit0 in Abstract community. He is very active interms of ecosystem engagement and content creation. His value is above and beyond. His inclusion in the community creates great postive impact to the Abstract as a whole. I believe that he can move up to another level with this great pace !

data.comment: An Exceptional Developer and Even Better Teammate
data.metadata: {"description":"Coffee is an exceptionally talented developer I’ve had the privilege of working with across multiple companies and projects over the years. He brings deep expertise in web3, unmatched reliability, and a calm, humble approach to every challenge. Always generous with his time and insight, he’s the kind of person everyone wants on their team."}

translation.translatedContent: An Exceptional Developer and Even Better Teammate
translation.translatedDescription: Coffee is an exceptionally talented developer I’ve had the privilege of working with across multiple companies and projects over the years. He brings deep expertise in web3, unmatched reliability, and a calm, humble approach to every challenge. Always generous with his time and insight, he’s the kind of person everyone wants on their team.

data.comment: A Creative Mind Who Elevates Every Project
data.metadata: {"description":"Nix is a rare mix of artist and developer who keeps pushing creative boundaries. He brings fresh ideas, solid execution, and great energy to every project. He’s someone I genuinely look forward to collaborating with again."}

translation.translatedContent: A Creative Mind Who Elevates Every Project
translation.translatedDescription: Nix is a rare mix of artist and developer who keeps pushing creative boundaries. He brings fresh ideas, solid execution, and great energy to every project. He’s someone I genuinely look forward to collaborating with again.

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Nix through Abstract trenches originally when looking at collections to bid. Got to know him more through Xeet as we are both advisors. Good guy, good dev."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Nix through Abstract trenches originally when looking at collections to bid. Got to know him more through Xeet as we are both advisors. Good guy, good dev.

data.comment: Easily one of my favorite web3 devs
data.metadata: {"description":"Curtis is good people. Not only a talented dev, but trustworthy and honest. He doesn't leave people hanging. Always going the extra mile. Would always jump at a chance to work with him."}

translation.translatedContent: Easily one of my favorite web3 devs
translation.translatedDescription: Curtis is good people. Not only a talented dev, but trustworthy and honest. He doesn't leave people hanging. Always going the extra mile. Would always jump at a chance to work with him.

data.metadata: {"description":"L0K0 is a real OG on Abstract, he launched the first NFT collection on Abstract, during the Testnet, the collection was innovative with a new IP, is also difficult to deploy especially when you are the first to launch.\nHumanly he is a serious and professional person."}

{"description":"Un merveilleux gigachad qui a tout compris à la vie. Bitcoin + Abstract Maxi quel combo incroyable. étant moi même un grand fan de Bitcoin Wizards je ne peux que être ami avec ce mec. \n\nIl est un Gigachad au sein de l'ecosystème Abstract, il est présent sur les réseaux, intervient de manière pertinente et amicale, aide quand il peut. C'est vraiment une personne respectable."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A wonderful gigachad who has figured out life. Bitcoin + Abstract Maxi, what an incredible combination. Being a big fan of Bitcoin Wizards myself, I can only be friends with this guy. 

He is a Gigachad within the Abstract ecosystem, he is present on social media, intervenes in a relevant and friendly manner, and helps when he can. He is truly a respectable person.

data.metadata: {"description":"Aside from just being a great guy, Nix is one of those rare devs that not only can write code but has an eye for generating beautiful art with it. Both his original collection \"Treeangles\" and his subsequent Hexagons collection are fully onchain SVGs and I absolutely love the geometric styles of his art."}

translation.translatedDescription: Aside from just being a great guy, Nix is one of those rare devs that not only can write code but has an eye for generating beautiful art with it. Both his original collection "Treeangles" and his subsequent Hexagons collection are fully onchain SVGs and I absolutely love the geometric styles of his art.

data.metadata: {"description":"Repping a web3 degen image is hard long-term. Ely does a good job balancing the fun side without straying into grifter territory. I’ve got to work with him advising Xeet and appreciate his sense of humor."}

translation.translatedDescription: Repping a web3 degen image is hard long-term. Ely does a good job balancing the fun side without straying into grifter territory. I’ve got to work with him advising Xeet and appreciate his sense of humor.

data.metadata: {"description":"Coffee is a top-tier person and  solidity dev. The kind of guy that is on the top of every team’s wish list.  He’s humble, honorable, and committed. Wish we had more like him. If you get a chance to do something with him, grab it."}

translation.translatedDescription: Coffee is a top-tier person and  solidity dev. The kind of guy that is on the top of every team’s wish list.  He’s humble, honorable, and committed. Wish we had more like him. If you get a chance to do something with him, grab it.

data.metadata: {"description":"Meeting Pavil on the Abstract Chain has been a massive highlight. He operates with pure gigachad energyrelentlessly consistent, highly active, and deeply invested in the space.  he has dropped custom banners for the crew and allowed us mint his incredible IRL green chain street art, his work is a testament to how much he genuinely cares about this ecosystem. If you want to see what authentic, passionate building looks like, look no further than Pavil"}

translation.translatedDescription: Meeting Pavil on the Abstract Chain has been a massive highlight. He operates with pure gigachad energyrelentlessly consistent, highly active, and deeply invested in the space.  he has dropped custom banners for the crew and allowed us mint his incredible IRL green chain street art, his work is a testament to how much he genuinely cares about this ecosystem. If you want to see what authentic, passionate building looks like, look no further than Pavil

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Pavil 씨가 Pudgy 커뮤니티에서 MVP인 걸 아시나요? 매주 커뮤니티에서 회원들의 눈에 띄는 펭귄들이 추천받는 명예의 전당이 있는데, 거기에 본인의 Pudgy NFT를 올린 친구예요. 그만큼 커뮤니티에 진심이라는 소리입니다.

이 친구는 스트릿 아티스트인데 마음이 참 따뜻해요. 펏지 커뮤니티의 일원에게 어떤 일이 생기면 그날을 기억한 후, 특별한 이벤트가 있는 사람의 펏지 NFT로 거리에 그림을 그리고 커뮤니티에 자랑합니다. 사람들이 다들 좋아해요.

그림 그리는 게 난이도가 높고 힘든 과정인데, 꾸준히 지금까지 예술을 하는 게 멋있어요. 언젠가는 저의 펏지 펭귄 그림도 그려주면 정말 좋을 것 같아요.

Abstract에서 방송하면서 그림 그리는 걸 라이브 스트림하고, 펏지 파티 같은 IP를 활용한 게임도 빠르게 소개하며, SBT 발행 소식, 실제 Pudgy가 들어간 실물 장난감 및 제품 언박싱 등등을 팔로업하면 Pudgy 커뮤니티에서 어떤 일이 벌어지는지 알 수 있습니다.

MOST VALUABLE PENGUIN, 즉 MVP라 불릴 만합니다. 저와 친구가 되어주어 고마워요!"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Did you know that Pavil is the MVP in the Pudgy community? Every week, there's a hall of fame where penguins who stand out to the community members are recommended, and he's a friend who posted his Pudgy NFT there. That's how sincere he is to the community.

He's a street artist with a very warm heart. If something happens to a member of the Pudgy community, he remembers that day and then draws a picture on the street with the Pudgy NFT of the person who has a special event and shows it off to the community. People all love it.

Drawing is a difficult and challenging process, but it's great that he's been consistently doing art until now. I hope he draws my Pudgy penguin someday.

By live-streaming his drawing on Abstract, quickly introducing games that utilize IPs like Pudgy Party, following up on SBT issuance news, and unboxing real toys and products with Pudgy in them, you can find out what's happening in the Pudgy community.

He deserves to be called the MOST VALUABLE PENGUIN, or MVP. Thank you for being my friend!

Definitly someone great to have in your circle.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0x0e3274FEa64567fdA14187c89B08f61048F4d45a
data.metadata: {"description":"Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.\nHe’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.
He’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0x69C14D9B0073Cc2556aE014B99335bc380a5076f
data.metadata:
{"description":"A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0xCCB0e7366CDfBFD471110ff02632F0542ed0283f
data.metadata: {"description":"When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract.

data.author: 0xE4888BF702294F01fedE3993bFeBc8f638e0c6Ef

data.comment: Much respected builder and a joy

translation.translatedContent: Much respected builder and a joy
translation.translatedDescription: Zorin is one of those people you can have the funniest conversations with and also excels at what he does. He's absolutely nailed his personal brand and has worked alongside some of the top teams in web3. He's kind and patient and I LOVE watching him on streams.

data.subject: 0xd0232776459fDF134AE7EA2E5AaAE58904fc3bFe
data.comment: A gem of a person and skilled wizard

translation.translatedContent: A gem of a person and skilled wizard
translation.translatedDescription:
Aiz is a rare breed. I met him initially via his excellent infographics and was lucky enough to meet again through Gigaverse, where he champions growth and rallies the community and creators together. Not only is he extremely skilled in his fields, he manages to be so whilst remaining humble, patient and kind. He creates value and adds it to every room he's in, simultaneously. 

A true pleasure to know him.

data.author: 0xE4888BF702294F01fedE3993bFeBc8f638e0c6Ef
data.subject: 0x4726A3f292468e1871A025c2649E6eD8B57D4007

translation.translatedDescription: So grateful to have met WW through Cambria/Abstract. He's a fabulous creator and always a pleasure to talk to or play games with. He's skilled in the space but also a really great and genuine person.

translation.translatedDescription: Lily Forest is an amazing and positive Abstract gigachad - one of the earliest contributors and a true vibe-maker in the community. She’s also a super fun and energetic streamer on the Portal. Every time I’ve joined her streams, the energy was incredible, she makes you feel part of something special!

data.author: 0x17AD03a98448a4E5E85D5989cF6eD51964ef4633
data.subject: 0xb0619D866f8f3c3524F9bF8D2E588A53e5343857

translation.translatedDescription: MIC is one of the kindest and most supportive members of the Abstract community. As an OG Abstract member and the creator of the Vietnamese Abstract community, he’s played a huge role in growing and strengthening our ecosystem. Always helpful, positive, and dedicated - MIC truly represents what community spirit means!

data.author: 0x17AD03a98448a4E5E85D5989cF6eD51964ef4633
data.subject: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6

translation.translatedDescription: PapaSmooth is one of the most trusted and valuable members of the Abstract community. He’s a genuinely great person with an incredibly positive attitude. I’ve known him for a long time, and he’s always been supportive, kind, and uplifting. Never seen anything bad from him — only good vibes and dedication!

data.author: 0x3B8fD3757D38E33E69BC40Dd9fF42fb0BEc35Ec5
data.subject: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD

translation.translatedDescription: When people talk to me about Loko, I think of the Ozy NFT collection. Loko is an abstract OG; he works and helps different projects with his designer talents. In addition to being talented, Loko is extremely kind. Very happy to be by his side as a giga.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0xAf2010cF97F6d783C99810B63365167E6DA838aF
data.metadata:
{"description":"This gigachad is young (yes, at 40, he’s young in my book) but incredibly talented.
I really enjoy his content it’s a mix of playful “bullposting” and genuinely interesting topics.
You can see that he takes the time to dig deep and stay informed about the ecosystem, like a true giga.
What’s impressive is how he combines humor with insight, making his posts both fun and valuable. It’s clear he’s not just here to post for the sake of it  he genuinely engages with the community and contributes meaningfully."}

translation.translatedDescription:
This gigachad is young (yes, at 40, he’s young in my book) but incredibly talented.
I really enjoy his content it’s a mix of playful “bullposting” and genuinely interesting topics.
You can see that he takes the time to dig deep and stay informed about the ecosystem, like a true giga.
What’s impressive is how he combines humor with insight, making his posts both fun and valuable. It’s clear he’s not just here to post for the sake of it  he genuinely engages with the community and contributes meaningfully.

data.author: 0xdd9418830De1369F2ad0d8A9CAa98997675c07b4
data.subject: 0xAf2010cF97F6d783C99810B63365167E6DA838aF

data.subject: 0x4726A3f292468e1871A025c2649E6eD8B57D4007

translation.translatedDescription: WhitestWizard is undeniably a pure person. I met him on abstract and he is a great person. He has always been involved in abstract, he is part of a team that builds on abstract, he is also a very good streamer. Always there to animate and please his community. WhitestWizard is a sensitive person, if you understand him he will become your best friend. It took me a while to understand him, and I realize that we don't see many people like him anymore. I wish you all the best.
